color.description:
Controls the link color.
- `'primary'` — uses the accent/primary color token.
- `'inherit'` — inherits the surrounding text color.

href.description:
The URL the link points to. Optional ONLY because a `disabled` link renders a
`<span>` with no href. For any enabled (non-disabled) link you must provide it —
an `<a>` without `href` is not keyboard-focusable and is not exposed as a link to
assistive technology, so an enabled Link without `href` is a bug, not a feature.

underline.description:
Controls text-decoration behavior.
- `'always'` — underline is always visible.
- `'hover'` — underline appears on hover and focus (default).
- `'none'` — underline is never shown.

external.description:
When true, automatically adds `target="_blank"` and merges `rel="noopener noreferrer"`
with any consumer-supplied `rel`. Consumer-supplied `target` is preserved if provided.

disabled.description:
When true, renders a `<span aria-disabled="true">` instead of `<a>`. The href is not
emitted and pointer-events are disabled. Use to show a link that is contextually
unavailable without removing it from the visual layout.

rel.description:
Forwarded to the rendered `<a>`. `"noopener noreferrer"` is merged in whenever the link
opens in a new tab — `external` is true OR the resolved target is `"_blank"`
(case-insensitive) — and the whole value is de-duplicated case-insensitively.

unsupportedProps.name: children
unsupportedProps.description: The link text or composed content. Required.

unsupportedProps.name: target
unsupportedProps.description: Forwarded to the rendered `<a>`. `external` supplies `"_blank"` only when no target is given.
